187 F1A F1A_ACTIVE_OTHERS (F1A) At Ease Interacting with Others CHAR 1 Psychosocial well-being: sense of initiative/invovlement - at east interacting with others. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space.
188 F1B F1B_PLAN_ACTIVITY (F1B) At Ease Doing Planned Activities CHAR 1 Psychosocial well-being: sense of initiative/invovlement - at ease doing planned/structured activities. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space.
189 F1C F1C_SELF_ACTIVITY (F1C) At Ease Doing Self-Initiated
